# Frontmatter

## YAML Frontmatter Tag

```html
<frontmatter>
  title: "Page Title"
  keywords: "keyword1, keyword2"
  layout: default
  pageNav: 3
  pageNavTitle: "Contents"
  header: header.md
  footer: footer.md
</frontmatter>
```

## Common Properties

- `title`
- `keywords`
- `layout`
- `pageNav`
- `pageNavTitle`
- `header`
- `footer`

## Override Interaction

Frontmatter can be overridden by matching `site.json` page/glob entries and `globalOverride`.

## User Guide Source

- <https://markbind.org/userGuide/tweakingThePageStructure.html#front-matter>
